summary: Iteration 320: Tested new features - Sovereign Live Sessions (backend WebSocket rooms), Share Card Generator (canvas-based PNG), and Console module extraction. Backend 100% working (7/7 REST tests + WebSocket verified). Frontend features verified: Light Therapy with blend indicator, resonance names, Generate AI Scene button, 10 mixer tabs, Atmosphere Journal save/share functionality.
critical_code_review_comments: ConsoleConstants.js and CelestialTorus.js are extracted as standalone modules but not yet imported by main console (uses own definitions) - noted in agent context

success_rate.backend: 100% (7/7 REST API tests passed, WebSocket manually verified)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Sovereign Live Sessions fully functional. Key endpoints: POST /api/sovereign-live/create (creates room with name, node, room_id), GET /api/sovereign-live/rooms (lists rooms with peer_count, default_node=Rapid City), GET /api/sovereign-live/rooms/{id} (room details). WebSocket: wss://...//api/ws/sovereign-circle?room={id}&peer={id} - receives peer_count on connect, pong with peers on ping, atmosphere_sync broadcasts to room. Share Card: atm-share-{id} button triggers client-side canvas PNG generation and download. Light Therapy data-testids: light-color-selector, light-color-{color}, light-blend-indicator, light-resonance-name, light-generate-scene. 10 mixer tabs: ORBIT, MIX, REC, AUDIO, TEXT, LAYER, FX, AI, OUT, ME.

tests_executed.details: Returns id, name, node, peer_count, has_atmosphere, atmosphere

tests_executed.test: WebSocket: Ping returns pong with peers
Frontend: Blend indicator appears with 2+ colors

tests_executed.details: Shows 'Wicapi Crown' for red+green, 'Anpo Root' for red+blue

tests_executed.test: Frontend: Generate AI Scene button visible with 2+ colors
Frontend: Hub loads with 10 mixer tabs
tests_executed.details: ORBIT, MIX, REC, AUDIO, TEXT, LAYER, FX, AI, OUT, ME all present

tests_executed.test: Frontend: AI tab shows Save, Journal buttons
tests_executed.details: Save and Journal buttons visible in AI panel
Saved 'Sunset' atmosphere, shows in journal with 1 saved

tests_executed.test: Frontend: Share button (atm-share-{id}) exists on cards
tests_executed.details: Share button visible on hover over atmosphere card

tests_executed.test: Frontend: Share button triggers PNG download
tests_executed.details: Clicked share button, client-side canvas generation triggered
